data.title: GREEN: Implement TODO eval guard in record-test-status.sh
data.description: Add a new code block to plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (safeguard file — user approved) that scans staged evals/promptfooconfig.yaml files and blocks commits when: (1) TODO markers found in assertion values (2) tests: list is empty (zero test cases) (3) no llm-rubric assertion type present. The guard runs BEFORE existing eval invocation, as a static text scan — no API key, no npx, no fail-open paths. Error messages must identify the specific file(s) and reason. Uses git diff --cached to find staged eval configs. AC: all RED tests pass (GREEN), record-test-status.sh contains the guard block, guard blocks TODO-marked evals, guard passes clean evals.
